prerequisites: A Hellobaton API key generated from your account.
Your Hellobaton company instance value, which is added to the Hellobaton base URL.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Hellobaton API key supplied in the required secret field api_key. This is the only authentication method the connector supports, and the api_key is the token used to authenticate against the Hellobaton API.

setupSteps.title: Obtain a Hellobaton API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Hellobaton account and generate an API key. The connector is rate limited at 1000 requests per minute per API key; if you receive errors, contact your customer success manager to request a rate limit increase.

setupSteps.title: Set the company instance
setupSteps.body: Provide the required company field. This is your Hellobaton company instance, which is added to the base URL used by the connector.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the api_key in the required secret api_key field and the company value in the company field, then save and run a connection test.
